reviews.text: We used Authentic Moments for our wedding in Estes Park and the experience was extraordinary. Cylina was great to work with and helped coordinate everything for the big day. Gretchen was our main photographer, and Rocco was our videographer, and they were amazing. They were kind, caring, fun, and made our day so special. They went above and beyond to help us capture our dream wedding. We got married on the 4th of July and wanted some pictures with the fireworks, they went out of their way to make sure we got everything we wanted. Our pictures were incredible and I can’t count the number of times I’ve re-watched our video, and I still have tears every time.  If you’re looking for a wedding photographer/videographer, do not hesitate, book them!!

Sean and his team are AMAZING!! Our video and photos came out STUNNING! We were fortunate enough to win our package in a giveaway, but that in no way changed the quality of our products. We are still getting compliments on our photos and we were married 05.04.24 :)

As a fellow vendor I can tell you that authentic moments does an amazing job at capturing the wedding day. Their pictures always look so beautiful and natural and you can really feel the emotions behind the film. I love that colors are real

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We couldn’t be happier with our experience with Bob and Anastacia from Authentic Moments! From start to finish, they went above and beyond to make us feel comfortable and confident. They were incredibly attentive — taking into account our excitement, nerves, and even the occasional awkwardness — and somehow turned it all into an experience that felt effortless and fun.

Bob’s professionalism and creativity felt completely natural, and Anastacia was amazing — organized, kind, and always one step ahead. Together, they made the day flow seamlessly and felt like part of our team rather than vendors.

We haven’t even seen the photos yet, but we already know they’ll be amazing. The energy, care, and passion they brought to every moment left us with zero doubt that they captured the day perfectly. We can’t recommend them enough!

UPDATE:  As expected, the photos are phenomenal!   Thanks, Bob!!!

We met the wonderful people at Authentic Moments during a wedding expo and were first impressed by their friendliness and ability to answer our many questions. What really sold us was when we mentioned the venue we were getting married at and they pulled up a video they had done there as an example of their work.

When we booked them, we had a meeting with Cylina who went over all the details and was very responsive every step of the way. On the big day, our videographer was Drake, and he was a total professional. He got so many great shots and worked well with our photographers while we took our portrait photos. I’m not sure if he was the one who edited the final videos, but our highlight reel is spectacular. We cry every time we watch it.

I had plans to add our own music to the highlight reel, but the way the editor structured the final product to the music used, we didn’t want to change it. Only a couple minor edits to add in some extra moments from the day and it was perfect.
